title: LeBron bests Kareem for most made FG in history
content: LeBron James made the 15,838th FG of his career on Thursday night, passing Kareem Abdul-Jabbar for the most made field goals in NBA history.

title: Bills trading for Bears WR Moore, sources say
content: The Bears have agreed to a trade to send wide receiver DJ Moore to the Bills, sources told ESPN's Adam Schefter.

title: Ex-Packers prez, team HOFer Harlan dies at 89
content: Former Packers president Bob Harlan, who helped restore the franchise to greatness, died Thursday at the age of 89.

title: Judge rules Beasley owes $1M to former agency
content: A federal judge in New York issued a $1 million civil judgment against NBA free agent Malik Beasley on Thursday in a contract dispute with his former agency.

title: Pens' Malkin ejected for slashing, could face ban
content: Penguins forward Evgeni Malkin received a five-minute major penalty and a game misconduct for slashing the Sabres' Rasmus Dahlin in the head during Thursday's game.

title: Sources: Bears to release veteran LB Edmunds
content: The Bears are releasing linebacker Tremaine Edmunds, a source told ESPN, a move that creates $15 million in cap space for the team.

title: NCAA challenging eligibility of Rebels' Chambliss
content: The NCAA is appealing the preliminary injunction that a state court in Mississippi granted to Ole Miss quarterback Trinidad Chambliss to allow him a sixth college season in 2026.

title: Messi, Miami honored by Trump at White House
content: Inter Miami and captain Lionel Messi attended a White House reception on Thursday to celebrate winning MLS Cup for the first time in club history.

title: ⚾ MLB Rank: Ranking baseball's top 100 players
content: From star sluggers like Ohtani and Judge to top pitchers like Skubal, we rank -- and make predictions for -- the best players in baseball right now.

title: Why Tatum is coming back now and what it means for Boston
content: Here's the latest on Jayson Tatum's return to Boston after a devastating Achilles injury -- and how it could shift the NBA's balance of power with just weeks to go in the season.

title: NBA All-Contract Team: Brunson, Avdija, Johnson lead 15-player roster
content: Could a roster built with only the best contracts -- no max or rookie deals allowed -- reach the playoffs?

title: Men's Bubble Watch: Ohio State, Miami create separation with key wins
content: The Buckeyes and Canes solidified their standings on the right side of the respective Big Ten and ACC bubbles.

title: Men's Power Rankings: What's at stake in every power conference
content: Can Florida rise to a 1-seed? Will UConn or St. John's win the Big East? What's on the line for our final top 25.

title: School of scandal: Coach allegedly moonlighted as a pimp
content: Multiple dismissals have occurred at Cal State Bakersfield as an investigation probes who knew what and when.

title: Barnwell: Sizing up the DJ Moore, Trent McDuffie blockbuster trades from all angles
content: The NFL's trade market has been active, with the Bills dealing for DJ Moore and the Rams adding Trent McDuffie. What do the moves mean for all four teams?

title: DJ Moore to Bills: Bears to eye Linderbaum? Impact on Allen, draft
content: Will trading Moore's contract enable Chicago to bolster its offensive line? That's one of eight questions we answer.

title: Why is Kyler Murray's free agency a little different? Let's answer nine big NFL offseason questions
content: Where will Kyler Murray land? Could offensive linemen get paid big money? Who is the best edge-rushing option? And what will happen with A.J. Brown?

title: World Baseball Classic preview: Power Rankings, most likely MVPs and how far each team could go
content: Can anyone challenge Team USA? Which stars will shine brightest? Here's everything you need for the 2026 WBC.

title: Wyshynski's NHL trade tier rankings: Which big names could bring a Stanley Cup?
content: The playoff races have restarted, with many teams seeking to bolster their rosters for a deep run this spring.

title: 'Nobody sleeps for like a month': How WNBA GMs will squeeze in drafts, free agency once CBA in place
content: As CBA negotiations linger, the time to conduct drafts and free agency gets shorter. We asked WNBA GMs how they're preparing.

title: Nine big questions for the nine top freshmen in the 2026 NBA draft
content: What key questions remain for Boozer, Peterson and seven other top freshmen in the 2026 NBA draft class?

title: Women's Bracketology: Bubble bursts for Bulldogs, Cardinal and Aggies
content: Losses Wednesday in their Champ Week openers dashed NCAA tournament hopes for three teams on the bubble.

title: Why the Chiefs traded Trent McDuffie, and what's next
content: The last time the Chiefs traded away a player of McDuffie's caliber, they went to three straight Super Bowls.

title: 'I'll close my eyes': Diamondbacks' Counsell makes pro debut against father Craig's Cubs
content: Brady Counsell got his first reps as a Diamondback on Thursday when he was named to the club's roster for a spring training clash with the Cubs, who are managed by his father.

title: Inside a surprise dance performance from UCLA women's basketball stars
content: Lauren Betts, Gabriela Jaquez and Charlisse Leger-Walker high kicked their way onto the UCLA dance team.

title: USMNT Big Board: Who should make Pochettino's USMNT roster for March camp?
content: It's the month of the final matches for the USMNT before its pre-World Cup camp. Who is looking good, and who is on the outside looking in for Mauricio Pochettino's squad?

title: Process over perfection: How UConn prepared to chase its third title in four years
content: The pressure of expectation derailed the Huskies' bid for a three-peat. Perspective has them back in contention.

title: The best teams in Europe: Can anybody touch Barcelona, Bayern?
content: As the calendar turns into March, we've seen more than enough in 2026 so far to rank the hottest, most in-form European clubs. Where does your team rank?

title: How a 21-year-old prodigy and a 38-year-old veteran ended up with the same fight
content: UFC 326 features a fight between Raul Rosas Jr. and Rob Font in an ultimate battle of youth vs. experience.

title: How Stewart and the Mist overcame Plum's 40 points to win the Unrivaled title
content: Despite 40 points from Kelsey Plum, Breanna Stewart led the Mist past the Phantom for the 2026 Unrivaled title.

title: The craziest F1 start ever? Why Australian Grand Prix might see chaos from the start
content: Grand prix starts have always held the potential for chaos, but this year there's almost guaranteed drama when the lights go out in Australia on Sunday. ESPN explains why.

title: Emma Hayes' vision for 2027 World Cup is becoming clear
content: After so much experimentation, how the USWNT will look under Emma Hayes at the 2027 Women's World Cup is becoming evident.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Liverpool eye move for Leipzig's Diomande
content: Liverpool are looking at potentially signing Yan Diomande from RB Leipzig. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: 33 players who jump out for 2026, from Vladdy to Arraez
content: Tristan H.Cockcroft highlights the players -- and stats -- that have grabbed his attention heading into the fantasy baseball season.

title: Draft guide: Rankings, tips, strategy, stats and more
content: All the rankings, projections, cheat sheets, strategy and analysis you need for the fantasy baseball season.

title: What is B-52 Stratofortress? How the Cold War-era US bomber is being used to strike Iran
content: US B-52 Stratofortress bombers are intensifying strikes against Iranian targets under Operation Epic Fury, hitting ballistic missile infrastructure and command-and-control posts. These long-range heavy bombers, designed during the Cold War, remain a crucial part of the US arsenal due to their payload capacity and endurance, capable of delivering both conventional and nuclear weapons.

title: ‘I made a big mistake ...’: Brook reveals key reason behind England’s heartbreak
content: England captain Harry Brook lamented fielding errors, especially dropping Sanju Samson on 15, as a key reason for their T20 World Cup semi-final loss to India. Samson's 89 powered India to 253, a total England narrowly missed despite Jacob Bethell's stunning 105. Brook praised his team's fight but acknowledged crucial mistakes.

title: Iran hints at 'unseen' weapons as war enters 7th day; US-Israel intensifies strikes — key points
content: The Middle East is engulfed in conflict as the US and Israel launch extensive military operations against Iran, following the death of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei.  Retaliatory strikes have been launched by Iran, targeting US bases, while both sides report significant military actions, including the destruction of an Iranian "drone carrier" and damage to schools.

title: Sam Altman asks Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei to ‘get his facts right’ amid AI rivalry
content: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman urged Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei to verify facts, emphasizing government authority over private companies. This comes amid escalating tensions, with Amodei criticizing Altman's relationship with the Trump administration and OpenAI's Pentagon deal, which Anthropic refused due to safety concerns.

title: Khamenei killing planned in November 2025? Inside Netanyahu's 'small forum' plot
content: Israel's defence minister Katz revealed a plan to assassinate Ayatollah Khamenei was considered as early as November 2025, with the timeline accelerated due to Iran's anti-regime protests. This led to joint US-Israeli planning and a high-intensity military campaign aimed at dismantling Iran's nuclear and missile capabilities and supporting regional proxies.

title: Set to freeze billions in Iranian assets? UAE weighs response to Iran attacks
content: The UAE is reportedly considering freezing key Iranian assets and implementing a financial crackdown to limit Tehran's access to foreign currency and global trade. Measures could include targeting shadow companies and currency exchanges, with accounts linked to the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps being a likely focus. This comes amid escalating tensions following an airstrike that killed Iran's Supreme Leader.

title: US gives India 30-day waiver to purchase Russian oil amid Middle East crisis
content: The US has granted India a 30-day waiver to continue buying Russian oil, aiming to stabilize global energy markets amid Middle East tensions. This move allows Indian refiners to secure crucial supplies, with Washington anticipating increased future energy imports from the US. The waiver addresses potential disruptions to vital shipping routes like the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Google founder Sergey Brin reportedly linked to Billionaire Bunker
content: Google co-founder Sergey Brin is reportedly linked to a $51 million waterfront mansion purchase in Miami's exclusive Allison Island. While his name isn't on the deed, transaction documents point to his involvement. This move places him alongside other tech titans like Larry Page and Mark Zuckerberg, who have also invested heavily in Miami's luxury real estate market, driving up prices.

title: Major records set in Wankhede thriller as India reach second straight T20 WC final
content: India secured a thrilling seven-run victory against England in the T20 World Cup 2026 semi-final, reaching their second consecutive final. A run-fest saw India post 253/7, with Sanju Samson starring. England's Jacob Bethell's maiden century wasn't enough as India clinched the nail-biting contest, setting up a final against New Zealand.

title: Priyanka Chopra reveals she had a tough time with pregnancies before Malti Marie was born
content: Priyanka Chopra and Nick Jonas welcomed their daughter Malti Marie Chopra Jonas in 2022, who was born prematurely at 27 weeks. The couple faced a challenging period with Malti spending months in the NICU.

title: Denied medical leave, UP loco pilot pulls down pants to show ‘proof’ of surgery
content: A loco pilot, recovering from surgery, faced a senior official's demand for proof of illness for sick leave extension. In a desperate act, he revealed his surgical wound. The incident, caught on video, went viral, leading to his brief suspension, which was later revoked after union intervention. He claims repeated demands for proof.

title: Anthropic becomes first-ever US company designated ‘risk to US national security’
content: AI firm Anthropic has been labeled a national security risk by the Department of War, a first for a US company. CEO Dario Amodei vows to challenge the designation, stating it's legally unsound and narrowly applies only to specific Department of War contracts, not all customer use.

title: UP horror: 16-year-old abducted from Holi fest, gangraped by 4
content: A 16-year-old girl was abducted and gang-raped during a Holi fest in Bulandshahr, Uttar Pradesh. She was taken to a car near fields and assaulted by four men. Her family found her unconscious. Police registered a case and arrested three accused. The victim is stable and undergoing medical tests. Villagers protested alleged police negligence.

title: 'Khamenei's son is lightweight': Trump says US should have role in choosing next leader
content: Amid escalating West Asian tensions and ongoing US-Israeli strikes, President Trump stated Iran is seeking a deal, but "a little bit late." He asserted that Operation Epic Fury is decimating Iran's military capabilities, claiming significant damage to its Air Force and Navy.

title: Youth killed by cousin during iftar gathering in Surat’s Rander
content: A family iftar meal turned tragic in Rander when a 20-year-old man was fatally stabbed by his cousin. The altercation reportedly began after the accused made a comment about the victim's mother, escalating into a fatal knife attack. Police apprehended the 22-year-old accused as he attempted to flee.

title: Connor McDavid sends clear message as Edmonton Oilers face trade deadline
content: Connor McDavid quickly endorsed the Oilers’ trade for Connor Murphy, stressing the need to add talent without subtracting key pieces. With Edmonton firmly in a win now phase and draft picks holding less value, the move reflects urgency around the Stanley Cup chase. Chicago gains a future asset, while the Oilers strengthen their blue line for an immediate playoff push.

title: Jerry Jones’ Dallas Cowboys linked to $106M Las Vegas Raiders DE trade
content: Dallas Cowboys owner Jerry Jones is reportedly targeting Las Vegas Raiders defensive end Maxx Crosby in a blockbuster trade. Analysts suggest the Cowboys are best positioned to acquire Crosby. The edge rusher is seeking a Super Bowl contender. And Jones is hungry for a Lombardi Trophy after a drought of 30 years. This potential move aligns with the Cowboys owner’s history of aggressive trades like Micah Parsons, Herschel Walker, and George Pickens.

title: New York Yankees linked to $330M Philadelphia Phillies star to pair with Aaron Judge
content: The New York Yankees are reportedly exploring a trade for Bryce Harper from the Philadelphia Phillies during the 2026 preseason. Such a move would pair Harper with Aaron Judge, significantly boosting the Yankees' offensive power. This potential deal could see the Yankees send outfield depth and prospects to Philadelphia, while the Phillies would gain financial flexibility and farm system depth.

title: T20 World Cup 2026: 97*, 89 and the Sanju Samson juggernaut rolls on
content: Sanju Samson continued his dream run at the T20 World Cup with a commanding 89 in Mumbai after an unbeaten 97 in Kolkata, powering India into the final. Once outside the playing XI, the wicketkeeper-batter has seized his opportunity with back-to-back match-winning knocks to become India’s unlikely hero.

title: 'Refused to delete photos': Man burned alive by ex live-in partner, her newly-wed husband in Agra
content: An autorickshaw driver was allegedly burned alive in Agra by his former live-in partner and her new husband after he refused to delete old photos and videos. The victim, Chand, was dragged from his vehicle, doused in petrol, and set ablaze. His family protested, demanding justice, leading police to register a case and assure swift action.

title: Political shift in Bihar: 5 faces who are likely to replace Nitish Kumar
content: Nitish Kumar's nomination for the Rajya Sabha may herald the rise of a BJP Chief Minister in Bihar, as five key players—Samrat Choudhary, Nityanand Rai, Dilip Jaiswal, Sanjay Jaiswal, and Janak Ram—vie for attention. Each contender, with their distinct caste affiliations and political backgrounds, could pave new paths in the state's governance landscape.

title: Superman Axar Patel to the rescue: The catch that never was... the effort that will always be
content: Axar Patel produced two stunning fielding moments in India's thrilling seven-run win over England, including a breathtaking relay effort that dismissed Will Jacks but did not feature beside his name in the scorecard. As India sealed a place in the final against New Zealand, the Nadiad boy now looks forward to a special homecoming in Ahmedabad.

title: Top stocks to buy: Stock recommendations for March 6- check list
content: Stock market recommendations: Bharti Airtel, and Tata Power Company are the top stock recommendations by Bajaj Broking Research on March 6, 2026. The target prices are expected to be hit in a span of around 6 months - the brokerage shares a detailed outlook on both stocks and also on Nifty and Bank Nifty:

title: CBSE cancels class 10 board exams in Middle East; postpones class 12 exam on March 7
content: CBSE has cancelled Class 10 board exams in several Middle East countries from March 7-11, 2026, and also postponed previously scheduled papers. The Class 12 exam on March 7, 2026, has been postponed, with revised dates to be announced later. Students and schools are advised to monitor official announcements for further updates.

title: 'They should have faced trial in court, not shot': YouTuber Saleem Wastik attackers’ father
content: A father mourns the loss of his two sons, Ghulfam and Zeeshan, who were killed in separate police encounters after being identified as prime suspects in an attack on YouTuber Saleem Wastik. The father believes his sons should have faced a court trial instead of being gunned down by police.

title: ‘Mission to sink navy’: US Central Command shares video of strike on Iranian drone carrier- watch
content: United States forces have struck an Iranian drone carrier, causing it to catch fire. This action is part of intensified military operations against the Iranian Navy. Over thirty Iranian warships have been sunk or destroyed. Attacks from Iran have significantly decreased. United States firepower over Iran is expected to surge dramatically as the conflict continues.

title: 'Heart rate would've been 160-175': Suryakumar Yadav opens up after India win
content: India secured a thrilling seven-run victory over England in the T20 World Cup semi-final, defending a massive 253/7. Despite Jacob Bethell's explosive 105, England fell just short at 246/7. Sanju Samson's 89 laid the foundation for India's formidable total, setting up a final clash against New Zealand.

title: Holi horror: Delhi man beaten to death after balloon water splashes woman
content: In a tragic turn of events during the vibrant Holi festivities in Uttam Nagar, Delhi, a simple splash from a water balloon ignited a deadly clash between two communities. The confrontation resulted in the brutal beating of 26-year-old Tarun, culminating in his tragic death.

title: Why Iran's global partners are staying on the sidelines
content: Iran's long-standing allies, including Turkiye, India, China, and Russia, are offering little more than words as the Islamic Republic faces attacks. These relationships, largely transactional and driven by necessity, lack the deep commitments needed for mutual defense. Experts suggest Iran's foreign policy, focused on militias rather than state alliances, has left it isolated when facing direct threats.

title: Jacob Bethell's blazing century rewrites record books in T20 World Cup semi final
content: Jacob Bethell's electrifying 105 off 48 balls, the fastest T20 World Cup century by an England batter, nearly secured a historic win against India. Despite his record-breaking knock, England fell short by seven runs in a thrilling semi-final chase of 254. India's strong batting and disciplined bowling ultimately prevailed in a high-scoring encounter.

title: Missing Sukhoi-30 crashed 60 km from Assam’s Jorhat after takeoff; search ops under way
content: A Sukhoi Su-30 fighter jet of the Indian Air Force crashed in Assam's Karbi Anglong district during a training sortie. The aircraft had lost radar contact shortly after departing from Jorhat. Search operations are currently in progress to locate the jet and its crew. This incident involves a key multirole fighter in the IAF's extensive fleet.

title: Nitish Kumar a wily strategist who made CM seat his own
content: Nitish Kumar exits Bihar CM post after two decades, sparking political upheaval. Known for his strategic alliances and ideological shifts, Kumar carved a unique niche as an OBC leader focusing on "Mandal-plus" policies and women's welfare. His political maneuvering, including caste-based strategies and welfarism, sustained his dominance for years.

title: Jasprit Bumrah hits golden milestone, scripts history in India vs England semi-final
content: Jasprit Bumrah achieved a historic milestone, claiming his 500th international wicket during the ICC Men's T20 World Cup 2026 semi-final against England. This feat places him among India's elite bowlers, reinforcing his status as a formidable modern-era fast bowler. Bumrah's consistent performance across formats continues to be a significant asset for the Indian team.

title: 'India don’t give it to ICC': Ex-Pak batter targets BCCI over doping tests
content: Pakistan cricketer Ahmed Shehzad sparked controversy by claiming the Board of Control for Cricket in India does not allow the International Cricket Council to conduct doping tests on Indian players. However, India’s testing system operates under the National Anti-Doping Agency, which follows global anti-doping rules set by the World Anti-Doping Agency.

title: US closes embassy in Kuwait after Iranian strikes as war spreads across Gulf
content: Amidst escalating Middle East tensions, the US Embassy in Kuwait has shut down following Iranian missile and drone strikes. These attacks, which killed six American soldiers and damaged the embassy, have spread to other Gulf capitals like Doha and Bahrain, disrupting air travel and oil shipments.

title: Sanju Samson scripts history, takes India to T20 World Cup final
content: Sanju Samson smashed a brilliant 89 off 42 balls in the T20 World Cup 2026 semi-final against England. His innings equalled Virat Kohli's record for the highest score by an Indian in a knockout match. Samson also set a new record for most sixes by an Indian in a single T20 World Cup tournament.

title: Delhi records season’s hottest day at 34.3°c, 7°c above normal; night temperatures up too
content: Delhi experienced its hottest day of the season with the maximum temperature reaching 34.3°C, seven degrees above normal. This sharp rise is attributed to clear skies and dry weather, with temperatures expected to climb further. Night temperatures are also trending upwards, settling at 18.2°C, five degrees above normal.

title: Rashmika Mandanna and Vijay Deverakonda share reception video
content: On March 4th, the newlyweds Rashmika Mandanna and Vijay Deverakonda marked their love story with an extravagant reception in Hyderabad. Accompanied by a heartfelt video montage, they expressed their heartfelt gratitude for all the love and support from fans and friends alike.

title: 'Jailer' star Shiva Rajkumar says, 'Actors not objects'
content: Kantara actress Sapthami Gowda has voiced concerns over inappropriate filming angles by paparazzi at public events, sparking a wider conversation. Veteran actor Shiva Rajkumar publicly supported her, urging media to respect women and avoid objectification. Other actresses have also joined the discussion, highlighting the need for dignity for female artists.

title: Over 60% turnout as Nepal votes in 'historic' polls powered by Gen Z
content: Nepal's Gen Z voters turned out in large numbers for snap parliamentary elections, a significant development following September protests that reshaped the country's politics. Despite logistical challenges in the mountainous nation, preliminary turnout exceeded 60%, with young activists viewing election day as the next phase of their movement for change and accountability.

title: Bihar: JDU cadre bet on Nishant to fill in father Nitish Kumar's shoes
content: Bihar's ruling party, JDU, anticipates Nishant Kumar's political debut as his father, Nitish Kumar, prepares to step down. This move aims to reassure party workers and maintain the JDU's traditional support base, particularly among the Kurmi community. Nishant, an engineering graduate, is reportedly being considered for a Deputy Chief Minister role, signaling continuity as Nitish shifts to the Rajya Sabha.

title: 499 runs and 34 sixes later, India beat England to enter T20 World Cup final
content: Sanju Samson's blistering 89 powered India to a massive total before the bowlers held their nerve in a six-hitting thriller at the Wankhede. England threatened through Jacob Bethell's century, but Jasprit Bumrah and Hardik Pandya's exceptional bowling sealed a dramatic seven-run win as India set up a T20 World Cup 2026 final clash with New Zealand.

title: 'We didn’t ask for ceasefire': Iran rejects US claim, says Tehran ‘ready for US ground invasion'
content: Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi declared readiness for a potential US ground invasion, asserting confidence in confronting American forces and dismissing any ceasefire requests. He blamed US or Israeli forces for a deadly school strike, stating negotiations have collapsed due to recent military actions, and warned of no winners in the escalating regional conflict.

title: India finally condoles killing of Iran's Khamenei; foreign ministers talk
content: Foreign Secretary Vikram Misri signed a condolence book at the Iranian embassy following the killing of Iran's supreme leader, amid criticism over India's initial silence. This move follows a telephonic conversation between External Affairs Minister S Jaishankar and his Iranian counterpart, with a potential high-level meeting scheduled.

title: A model for tackling human-animal conflict
content: The State government is looking at more holistic conservation solutions to protect the habitats of Asian elephants in Tamil Nadu.

title: Karnataka Budget 2026-27 LIVE updates: CM Siddaramaiah to present his 17th Budget
content: The Congress government faces a tightrope walk between containing revenue deficit and funding its guarantee schemes, amid speculation over a possible change of Chief Minister after the Budget Session

title: BJP claims ₹39,000 crore of SCSP-TSP funds diverted for guarantee schemes by Congress government in Karnataka
content: BJP leader Rajkumar Patil Telkur claimed that the Siddaramaiah-led government is reportedly preparing to divert an additional ₹15,000 crore in the new budget, continuing the pattern of misallocation

title: India in touch with multilateral agencies, U.S. DFC for shipping insurance, to shield impact on fuel supplies
content: India is in touch with Paris-headquartered International Energy Agency (IEA) and ministers of oil-producing countries, among others, as it looks to keep their fuel supplies secure

title: Hyderabad’s adulterated food raids: Decoy buyers, tip-offs lead to a series of busts
content: The raids have led to the seizure of thousands of kilograms of raw material and hundreds of kilograms of adulterated food products.

title: When gods walk at dawn: A traveller’s guide to experiencing Theyyam in North Kerala
content: In Kavvayi, 40 kilometres from Kannur, a man becomes a ‘god’. For visitors willing to trade sleep for firelight, the Kaliyatta festival at the Sree Kathivanoor Veeran temple offers one of Kerala’s most intense cultural experiences. We travel to show you how and why you should experience this

title: All five Rajya Sabha candidates file nomination in Odisha
content: President of the State unit of Bharatiya Janata Party, Manmohan Samal; sitting BJP Rajya Sabha member, Sujeet Kumar; and hotelier and former Union Coal Minister, Dilip Ray, all backed by the saffron party, submitted their papers.

title: Security at airport takes precedence over devotional right, says Bombay HC
content: The petition was moved by the Taxi-Rickshaw Ola-Uber Men’s Union, which contended that a temporary shed in the airport vicinity, historically used by drivers for congregational prayers, was demolished by civic authorities last year.

title: A Tale of Two Parivars in Bihar
content: With Nitish Kumar set for exile, the Janata Parivar is scuttling towards extinction while the Sangh Parivar is ascendant, and Mandal is now a subset of Kamandal

title: Experiencing heat during pregnancy results in fewer male babies: study
content: Beyond birth ratios, research has linked rising heat to severe maternal health complications, including hypertension and gestational diabetes; researchers emphasise that many global health research agencies underestimate the impact on vulnerable populations

title: Bulldozers on Bhoodan lands kick up political dust
content: Nearly 600 houses were razed in a massive demolition drive at a village near Khammam city on February 24, rendering over 1,800 people homeless. While officials say the action was taken to clear unauthorised structures and reclaim land worth over ₹250 crore, the displaced families, many of whom claim to hold pattas issued by the erstwhile Andhra Pradesh Bhoodan Board in 2014, allege they were not given any notice. The demolitions have sparked protests, sharp political reactions and renewed debate over the fate of lands once donated for the landless under the historic Bhoodan movement, writes P. Sridhar

title: U.S. issues 30-day waiver to allow India to purchase Russian oil amid West Asian supply woes
content: Scott Bessent said the move aims to enable oil to keep flowing into the global market amid the war in West Asia that has disrupted oil supply

title: Why north Karnataka’s under-nutrition burden stays high
content: In north Karnataka districts, child undernutrition has been an unrelenting problem for decades. More than a function of food scarcity, it is an outcome of overlapping issues, some inter-generational and some structural, writes Shilpa Elizabeth

title: The Kumbakonam connection of MGR, M.K. Nambyar and M.S.  Swaminathan
content: The families of the iconic film star and former Tamil Nadu Chief Minister, the distinguished constitutional lawyer, and the celebrated agricultural scientist hailed from Kerala. But they spent a formative part of their lives in Kumbakonam, known for its rich cultural heritage, before rising to national prominence in politics, cinema, law, and science

title: A trailblazer for the rights of  Dalits and the empowerment of women
content: Meenambal Sivaraj was born on December 12, 1904, in Rangoon, in a family that placed great importance on education and service. One of her most significant contributions was her work with All India Scheduled Castes Federation founded by  Ambedkar

title: Bhaktavatsalam’s take on the destruction of documents relating to anti-Hindi agitation
content: He said he was advised that papers on politicians against whom detention orders had been served need not be kept so that they would not be available to the very people who were likely to take charge of the government. When Ministers came to know about officers who had made reports about them, they would get prejudiced, he further said

title: Suspension of flights, shipping surcharge push exporters from south India to the edge
content: Suspension of flights from India to West Asia disrupts supply chain for vegetables, fruits, and seafood exported from South India

title: Ashok Gehlot slams Centre’s silence on U.S. attack on Iranian warship in Indian Ocean
content: An emerging superpower should not remain a mute spectator to such violent incidents in its own region, says Mr. Gehlot; if we are the true protectors of the Indian Ocean, we must put our autonomy and safety of our guests above all else, he adds

title: Matuas pushed into ‘confusing situation’, deliberately excluded from voter list by SIR, says Mamata
content: West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee alleges that political games are being played in the name of giving citizenship and questions are being raised about their identity

title: The promise of a bridge to development in Odisha’s Kalahandi
content: For tribal and Dalit families stranded on a landmass within the vast Indravati reservoir in Odisha’s Kalahandi district, life remains in limbo. Satyasundar Barik travels to this remote, rarely visited region to examine how a project widely credited with ushering in prosperity has failed to positively transform the lives of the people there

title: Nitish Kumar files nomination papers for Rajya Sabha, ending 20 years as Bihar CM
content: Confirming speculation about the end of his 20-year rule in Bihar with a post on social media, Mr. Kumar declared that he had a “desire in his heart” to become a member of both the Houses of Parliament.

title: Kalyan Singh told an ‘utter lie’: K.K. Venugopal on Babri Masjid demolition
content: In a candid conversation with The Hindu, K.K. Venugopal discusses the “command from political masters” that triggered the anti-Sikh riots in the 1980s, his sense of betrayal when he realised then-UP CM Kalyan Singh had told him an “utter lie” that the Babri Masjid would not be demolished in the 1990s.

title: Kerala’s public health sector in need of a booster shot
content: Complaints of lapses in the famed public health system of Kerala hog the headlines as the State braces for Assembly polls. C. Maya finds out what is ailing the health sector of the State

title: Rajya Sabha election: Congress fields new face Christopher in Tamil Nadu
content: The 53-year-old is one of the secretaries of the All India Congress Committee, and had been in charge of northeastern States such as Manipur and Nagaland

title: The tumultuous tenure of R.N. Ravi as Tamil Nadu Governor
content: From regularly walking out of the Assembly to raising issues over the appointment of Vice-Chancellors to State-run universities, Ravi and the DMK government led by Chief Minister M.K. Stalin were rarely on the same page

title: KWA to enhance efficiency of water treatment plant in Aluva
content: The upgrade to result in generation of additional 10 MLD of treated water and improvement of drinking water supply in Kochi and adjoining panchayats

title: Internal quota issue hangs fire with discussion incomplete in Cabinet
content: Siddaramaiah told his colleagues that a decision could be taken at a special cabinet that would be called shortly

title: Governor removes Vice-Chancellor of Sree Sankaracharya University of Sanskrit
content: Ciza Thomas, Vice-Chancellor of APJ Abdul Kalam Technological University, will hold additional charge of the Vice-Chancellor of the university

title: ASHA workers stage protest in Vijayawada; government responds positively to demands
content: Health Minister assures the workers that steps will be taken to grant leaves in accordance to the norms prescribed under the National Health Mission.

title: Watch: India condoles Khamenei’s death; foreign secretary signs condolence book
content: ndia has formally condoled the death of Iran’s Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei. Foreign Secretary Vikram Misri visited the Iranian Embassy in New Delhi and signed the condolence book on behalf of the Government of India, conveying sympathies to the Iranian people.

title: Watch: The SIR connumdrum in West Bengal and impact on ensuing assembly polls
content: The SIR controversy in West Bengal is emerging as a key political issue ahead of the upcoming Assembly elections. As parties trade charges over the implications of the Special Intensive Revision of electoral rolls, the debate could influence voter perceptions and shape the poll narrative in the state.

title: Days ahead of polls, Tamil Nadu, West Bengal get new Governors
content: West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee says Union Home Minister Amit Shah called her and informed about R.N. Ravi’s appointment and that she was “shocked” by the resignation of Ananda Bose

title: Iran crisis: 60,000 tonnes of basmati rice stuck in ports, exporters seek urgent govt. aid
content: Exporters ask Centre to recognise current logistics disruption as a force majeure type; close to 90% of total rice exports to West Asia, worth about ₹25,000 crore annually, is basmati rice

title: Sri Lankan Supreme Court judge moves Karnataka High Court for removal of links of old online news reports from Google
content: Meanwhile, the High Court asked the advocate for Justice Nawaz to serve notice to Sri Lankan newspapers through emails

title:
Sinking of Iranian ship brings war to region, say 
Sri Lankan and Maldivian leaders
content: They call for closer communication on the issue with India as a ‘net security provider’ in the region

title: Madras Sanskrit College plans reversion to self-financing institution; students oppose move
content: The students say they may lose access to events such as the Kasi Tamil Sangam and national-level competitions and seminars; they add that some teachers, who are paid by the Central Sanskrit University, have also planned to leave by March 31, when the tie-up ends

title: Iran-Israel war grounds IndiGo’s Europe flights
content: IndiGo’s aircraft, leased from the Norwegian carrier Norse, face twin issues of European Union Aviation Safety Agency restrictions and the Pakistan airspace ban

title: Medical colleges asked to link patients’ digital health records
content: All patients coming for OPD, emergency, or hospital admissions must now have linked Ayushman Bharat Health Account IDs; this is aimed at weeding out the fake patients that some colleges submit during the NMC assessment

title: Watch: West Bengal Governor C.V. Ananda Bose resigns, R.N. Ravi takes charge
content: West Bengal Governor C.V. Ananda Bose stepped down from his post on March 5, submitting his resignation to President Droupadi Murmu in Delhi. Tamil Nadu Governor R.N. Ravi has been appointed to replace him ahead of the State Assembly polls.

title: Fitness Certificates only at designated RTO locations geo-fenced through mVahan app
content: The objective of the new system is to ensure that inspections take place only within authorised areas, and to curb irregularities in the issuance of FCs for commercial vehicles

title: Maoist killed in Dantewada
content: The Maoist was identified as Rajesh Punem, a resident of Burji village and a member of the Bhairamgarh Area Committee

title: Following complaints, Madhya Kailash flyover gets smooth tar coat
content: A retired highways engineer says according to the Indian Roads Congress 2015 Code, a cement concrete wearing coat could be used only in rural areas, where traffic volume would be considerably less

title: ED arrests two chartered accountants in fraud case
content: The investigative agency found that the proceeds of about ₹641 crore were initially credited into mule accounts managed and operated by members of certain Telegram groups

title: Title deed distribution in Idukki hits another snag as Kerala High Court stays proceedings
content: The court had recently vacated a previous stay, allowing the State government to issue title deeds under strict condition. However, after the court was informed that the State government was proceeding with the distribution without complying to its specific directives,  a temporary stay was imposed

title: Karnataka High Court suggests State govt. to evolve mechanism for verification of migrant labourers
content: It is equally important to ensure that migrant workers are not stigmatised as a class, since criminal liability is individual in nature and the Constitution protects the dignity and equality of all persons, the bench said.

title: Watch: Rajya Sabha nominations: Nitish Kumar, Sharad Pawar lead the race for power
content: The race for the 2026 Rajya Sabha elections has begun, with 37 seats across 10 states going to polls on March 16. Key leaders in the fray include Bihar Chief Minister Nitish Kumar and veteran politician Sharad Pawar.

title: West Bengal Governor C.V. Ananda Bose resigns ahead of Assembly polls
content: Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee receives information from Union Home Minister Amit Shah; Tamil Nadu Governor R.N. Ravi will take up responsibility

title: CB-CID rules out organ theft involving Viluppuram ashram
content: Full body scan done on dozens of destitute and mentally challenged persons who were shifted to other States

title: Tamil Nadu Governor R.N. Ravi transferred to Bengal
content: Mr. Ravi’s transfer was announced by West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee in an X post; Kerala Governor Rajendra Vishwanath Arlekar will discharge functions of Governor of Tamil Nadu.

title: Global Ayyappa Sangamam: Kerala HC directs auditing firm to file statement on ‘anomalies, deficiencies and lapses’ in TDB accounts
content: Court says records available indicate that substantial amounts have been committed and disbursed without vouchers and receipts and without sufficient clarity as to the financial approvals obtained

title: Belagavi Airport appeals to people not to flash laser lights at aircraft
content: Investigation under way after pilots complain to Mopa Airport authorities in Goa of a laser flash at the Karnataka-Maharashtra border

title: Watch: Epilepsy: Management and care | Webinar
content: This webinar will help demystify epilepsy by explaining its causes, symptoms, and available treatment options. The discussion will focus on how epilepsy is managed over the long term, the importance of timely medical care, and the role of awareness in improving quality of life and reducing stigma.

title: AITUC stages protest demanding immediate revision of minimum wages in Karnataka
content: The protesters call for doubling variable dearness allowance from four paise to eight paise per Consumer Price Index (CPI) point

title: Police quiz Mallikarjun Mutya for second day in POCSO Act case
content: Petition filed by the accused seeking anticipatory bail before the District and Sessions Court in Yadgir will come up for hearing today

title: Eluru canal chokes with garbage; municipal authorities term it a temporary problem
content: Of the three canals and a rivulet that flow through the city, Bandar and Ryves canals do not require much cleaning, while the Budameru rivulet and Eluru canal carry a lot of filth

title: Report conflict in West Asia with utmost caution, says Pinarayi Vijayan
content: He says it is a time for the media to exercise restraint and demonstrate a sense of deep responsibility in covering the unfolding crisis as news relating to the conflict could induce fear and anxiety among the relatives of Keralite expatriates

title: New retaining wall along right margin of Krishna river to protect 20,000 people from floods
content: Nara Lokesh likely to lay foundation stone for the project on March 9; proposal, worth ₹294 crore, was approved in January 2025

title: 2 Air Force Pilots Killed In Sukhoi Su-30 Crash In Assam
content: The Su-30MKI was on a training mission and had gone missing shortly after taking off from the Jorhat airbase in Assam.

title: Stock Market LIVE Updates: Sensex Falls 500 Points, Nifty Opens 150 Lower After Dow Sell-Off
content: Sensex Today | Nifty 50 | Stock Market Today Live Updates: India's benchmark indices opened and ended in green on Thursday.

title: Trump's 'Rocky IV' Moment On Oil Prices During Iran Op: "If They Rise, They Rise"
content: President Donald Trump said on Thursday he was not concerned about rising US gas prices driven by the widening Iran conflict, telling Reuters in an exclusive interview that the US military operation was his priority.

title: A Happy Nitish Kumar Is Key To BJP's Bihar Equation
content: Bihar Chief Minister Nitish Kumar, who filed his nomination for the Rajya Sabha today, may not be easy to replace. So far as the BJP is concerned, it may not even go as smoothly as replacing the Chief Ministers in Rajasthan or Madhya Pradesh.

title: Gen Z's Favourite Balendra Shah Leads Ex-PM KP Sharma Oli As Nepal Counts Votes
content: Nepal election results live: Rapper-turned-politician Balendra Shah, who drew young voters in pre-poll rallies, is leading KP Sharma Oli, 74, on his home turf in Jhapa.

title: US Likely Responsible For Deadly Strike On Iranian Girls' School: Report
content: US military investigators believe it is likely that US forces were responsible for an apparent strike on an Iranian girls' school that killed scores of children on Saturday but have not yet reached a final conclusion or completed their investigation,

title: India Gets 30-Day Waiver From US To Buy Russian Oil Amid Iran War
content: India's access to crucial energy supplies received a temporary boost on Friday after US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent announced a 30-day waiver allowing Indian refiners to purchase Russian oil.

title: "Shocked, Concerned": Mamata Banerjee On Bengal Governor's Resignation
content: Tamil Nadu Governor RN Ravi has been appointed as the new Governor of West Bengal after CV Ananda Bose resigned.

title: Pentagon Designates Anthropic A 'Supply Chain Risk' After Deal Turndown
content: The Trump administration is following through with its threat to designate artificial intelligence company Anthropic as a supply chain risk in an unprecedented move that could force other government contractors to stop using the AI chatbot Claude.

title: Warm Spell Grips Delhi As City Sizzles At 34.3 Degrees Celsius
content: Thursday marked the hottest day of the season so far, with the maximum temperature rising to 34.3 degrees Celsius.

title: US, Israel-Iran War News Live Updates: Middle East War Enters Day 7, Israel Strikes Beirut, Iran Attacks Bahrain
content: The raging war in the Middle East entered its seventh day on Friday, with the Israeli military announcing a "next phase" in the conflict and bombing Lebanon's Beirut.

title: Israel-Iran War Highlights: After India Condoles Khamenei's Death, Jaishankar Speaks To Araghchi
content: Israel-Iran War: Iran launched a new wave of attacks Thursday morning at Israeli and American bases and threatened that the United States would "bitterly regret" torpedoing an Iranian warship in the Indian Ocean

title: Air Force's Sukhoi Su-30 That Went Missing Crashes In Assam, Search Ops On
content: A Su-30 MKI fighter jet of the Indian Air Force (IAF) crashed in Assam's Karbi Anglong district on Thursday. The IAF said the search operation for the aircraft is underway.

title: Iran Has Not Yet Elected New Supreme Leader: Top Iranian Official
content: Iran has not yet elected the successor of Supreme Leader Ayatollah Syed Ali Khamenei, who was assassinated in a joint US-Israeli airstrike last week, a senior Iranian official said Thursday.

title: Trump Says He Wants To Finish Iran Then Cuba "Just Question Of Time"
content: President Donald Trump suggested Thursday that he would turn to an unspecified project for Cuba, the Caribbean island already facing a US energy blockade, after the war against Iran.

title: US Says It Has Destroyed More Than 30 Iranian ships Since War Began
content: The United States has sunk more than 30 Iranian ships during the ongoing war, while ballistic missile and drone attacks by Tehran's forces are down substantially, a top US military officer said Thursday.

title: Trump Says Iran Calling US About A Deal Amid War
content: President Donald Trump on Thursday said Tehran was reaching out to the United States about making a deal amid US and Israeli strikes on Iran, adding that further action to reduce pressure on oil was imminent.

title: US House Votes Down Bid To Rein In Trump's Iran War Powers
content: The US House of Representatives on Thursday rejected an effort to curb Donald Trump's authority to wage war against Iran, as the president faces fierce criticism over launching the conflict without seeking approval from Congress.

title: More Than 20 States Sue Trump Over Tariffs Imposed After Supreme Court Ruling
content: Trump has said the tariffs are essential to reduce America's longstanding trade deficits. He imposed duties under Section 122 of the Trade Act of 1974 after the Supreme Court struck down tariffs he imposed last year under an emergency powers law.

title: UFC 326 expert picks: Max Holloway is a tough matchup for Charles Oliveira
content: a panel of four offer picks and insight for the main event at UFC 326 . the titleholder is going for his second defense of the ceremonial title . he beat Dustin Poirier by unanimous decision in his last fight in July .

title: Big 12 spring preview: Storylines, key positions and players to watch
content: Bear Bachmeier is back for his sophomore season after eclipsing 3,033 passing yards and 15 touchdowns in 2025 . a look at the top storyline, a position of intrigue and player to watch for each Big 12 team heading into the spring . the wildcats roared back last season to fifa .

title: Summer transfer needs for all 20 Premier League teams
content: all 20 premier league clubs are working furiously behind the scenes to produce short lists, decide on targets and set their course for next season . don Hutchison and Steve Nicol disagree over Fabian Hürzeler's criticism of arsenal's tactics in their 1-0 win .

title: World Cup squads: Predicting starting XIs for England, Spain, France, more
content: ESPN's World Cup Power Rankings reveals the top 15 contenders . the first edition of our rankings is based on form and fitness . we're drilling deeper on the major nations and the three host nations . each of those countries expected to challenge for top honors this summer has a weakness somewhere on the pitch .

title: One reason to root for every driver on the 2026 grid
content: Zak Brown has rebuilt f1's newest world champion, but is he treated like one? he has long been one of the sport's most popular figures, yet even after lifting the title, some still question whether he carries the same ad .

title: Lendeborg, Stirtz, more: This season's 25 best transfers
content: only a few teams that have been led by true freshmen in the one-and-done era have won national titles . the transfers have dominated college basketball in the portal era . last season, Walter Clayton Jr. was the Most Outstanding Player in Florida's national title run, two years after transferring from Iona .

title: Reid projects Rounds 1-2 with his new NFL mock draft
content: 2026 draft class updated after the Rams traded their no. 29 pick to the Chiefs . more than 300 prospects for the draft converged on Lucas Oil Stadium for drills, 40-yard dashes, interviews with team personnel and medical exams . there is still more to be done between now and the start of the first round on April 23 in Pittsburgh .

title: Pre-spring QB rankings for all 68 Power 4 teams
content: college football rosters are as stable as they'll ever be as spring football gets started . 68 power-conference quarterbacks ranked based on stats, trends and recent performances . we have at least a reasonable idea of who will start for most of the teams .

title: Tracking NFL free agency: Updates on re-signings, trades, cuts and rumors
content: free agency officially begins at 4 p.m. ET on monday, with the start of the new league year . teams can actually begin negotiating and agreeing to terms with players at noon ET on Monday, March 9 . four players receiving one: Cowboys WR George Pickens, Falcons TE Kyle Pitts Sr, Jets RB Breece Hall and Colts QB Daniel Jones .

title: Live NHL trade tracker for 2025-26: All the deals made before March 6 deadline
content: the trade deadline for the 2025-26 NHL season is Friday . the deals continue to roll in as contenders look to bolster their roster . you'll find information on every trade made since the start of the regular season .

title: Power Rankings: How Champ Week can help or hurt the top teams
content: the 2025-26 ESPN women's college basketball Power Rankings celebrates their fifth-straight SEC regular season title . the 2026 regular-season champions are also the defending champs of their respective 2025 tournaments .
